chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-2064 of 2024 Zulfiqar Ali Baloch & others Versus Province of Sindh & others Date Order with signature of Judge For orders as to maintainability of petition. Dated: 05.03.2025 Mr. Malik Naeem Iqbal for petitioner. Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, Assistant Advocate General for respondents No.1 and 2. Mr. Ali Asadullah Bullo for respondent No.3. 10, 12 and 13 to 17. Mr. Liaquat Ali Khaskheli for respondents No.5, 7 and 10. -.-.- Learned counsel for petitioners will be satisfied if this Court directs the Departmental Promotion Committee to be convened within two months of the vacancy arising for the post of Accountant (BPS-17) wherein petitioners’ case should be considered in accordance with law. Order accordingly. Copy of this order shall be sent to the Secretary Finance for compliance. Petition, along with pending applications, stands disposed of in the above terms. Judge Judge
